videos.title: Social Job Searching Part 4
videos.description:
Have you heard the term "Social Job Searching"?

It is a relatively new phenomenon, but it is quickly becoming one of the most popular ways to find a job.

I will teach you the 5 Phases to increase your chances of landing your next job.
How to approach the Modern Recruiter and Hiring Manager
Guided Profile Makeover that shows the skills, experience and expertise for the job you want. We know they will look and so we want them to see you are perfect for the job.
The Job Search phase will show you
